prompt: show me a healthy x ray of the lung
remarks: The image in the cond_images has tuberculosis, healthy lung should be clear and clean
prompt_refined: Edit image 1, which displays an X-ray of lungs with significant pathology, by transforming the affected areas to represent a healthy lung X-ray. Remove the widespread diffuse opacities, cavitations, and irregular patterns seen throughout both lung fields, making the lung fields appear clear, uniformly radiolucent, and free of any disease indications, consistent with a normal chest X-ray.
objects: X-ray image of a human chest
Widespread diffuse opacities (should not be present)
Irregular patterns in lung fields (should not be present)
